tools.name: Create Featurebase Article
tools.description: Create a new article

collectionId.description: Collection ID to place this article in (from list-collections)

tools.name: Create Featurebase Changelog Entry
tools.description: Create a new changelog entry

tools.name: Create Featurebase Collection
tools.description: Create a new help center collection (optionally nested under a parent collection)

parentId.description: Parent collection ID for nesting (omit for top-level)

tools.name: Create Featurebase Comment
tools.description: Create a new comment on a post or changelog with support for threaded replies and private comments

parentCommentId.description: Parent comment ID for threaded replies

tools.name: Create Featurebase Company
tools.description: Create a new company

tools.name: Create Featurebase Custom Field
tools.description: Create a new custom field definition

type.description: Field type: string, number, boolean, date, array

options.description: Valid values for string enum fields

itemType.description: Type of array items (string or number)

tools.name: Create Featurebase Post
tools.description: Create a new post.

categoryId.description: Category ID where post will be created

tools.name: Create Featurebase Webhook
tools.description: Create a new webhook subscription

tools.name: Delete Featurebase Article
tools.description: Delete an article

tools.name: Delete Featurebase Changelog Entry
tools.description: Delete a changelog entry

tools.name: Delete Featurebase Collection
tools.description: Delete a help center collection

tools.name: Delete Featurebase Comment
tools.description: Delete a comment from a post or changelog (soft-deletes if replies exist)

tools.name: Delete Featurebase Post
tools.description: Delete a post.

tools.name: Delete Featurebase User
tools.description: Delete a user by email or userId

userId.description: Your system user ID to delete

tools.name: Delete Featurebase Webhook
tools.description: Delete a webhook

tools.name: Get Featurebase Article
tools.description: Get a single article by ID

tools.name: Get Featurebase Changelog Entry
tools.description: Get a single changelog entry by ID

tools.name: Get Featurebase Post
tools.description: Get a single post by ID.

tools.name: Get Featurebase User
tools.description: Get a user by email or userId

tools.name: Identify Featurebase User
tools.description: Identify or update a user in FeatureBase (upsert)

tools.name: List Featurebase Articles
tools.description: List articles with filtering and pagination

tools.name: List Featurebase Boards
tools.description: List all feedback boards

tools.name: List Featurebase Changelog Entries
tools.description: List changelog entries with filtering and pagination

limit.description: Number of changelog entries to return (1-100)

tools.name: List Featurebase Collections
tools.description: List help center collections with optional filtering by parentId and pagination

parentId.description: Filter by parent collection ID (omit for top-level collections)

tools.name: List Featurebase Comments
tools.description: List comments for a post or changelog with filtering and pagination

tools.name: List Featurebase Companies
tools.description: List companies with pagination

tools.name: List Featurebase Custom Fields
tools.description: List all custom field definitions

tools.name: List Featurebase Posts
tools.description: List posts with filtering and pagination.

limit.description: Number of posts to return (1-100, default 10)

tools.name: List Featurebase Users
tools.description: List identified users with pagination, filtering, and sorting

limit.description: Number of users to return per page (1-100, default: 10)

tools.name: List Featurebase Webhooks
tools.description: List webhooks with pagination (secret is excluded from output)

tools.name: Update Featurebase Article
tools.description: Update an article

collectionId.description: Collection ID to move this article to (from list-collections)

tools.name: Update Featurebase Changelog Entry
tools.description: Update an existing changelog entry

tools.name: Update Featurebase Collection
tools.description: Update an existing help center collection

collectionId.description: Collection ID to update (used as path parameter)

tools.description: Update an existing comment's content, pin status, or privacy settings

tools.description: Update an existing post.
